title: stelis glomifera
intro: Stelis glomifera is a plant species commonly known as the "hairy stelis" or "orchid tree", belonging to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, with its roots and stems being rich in medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Stelis glomifera include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and skin care. In herbal preparations, the roots and stems of the plant are often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams.
